title: aeonium arboreum var. holochrysum
intro: Aeonium arboreum var. holochrysum, also known as the 'Sunset' or 'Holochrysum' Aeonium, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been found to possess wound-healing and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Aeonium arboreum var. holochrysum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and provide protection against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
